title: Bind/Unbind rules
content:
Use this endpoint to bind objects to an existing rule, or unbind objects from a rule that they were previously bound to. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/optimizer/rule/batch_bind/| /v1.3/optimizer/rule/batch_bind/| |Request parameter data type |`advertiser_id`: number
`rule_id`: number
`dimensions_id`: number []|`advertiser_id`: string
`rule_id`: string
` dimensions_id`: string[] | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type
Allowed format: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {Required}|string| Advertiser ID. | |bind_info {required}| object[]|Information about binding.| #|rule_id {required}|string| ID of the rule that you want to bind objects to.| #|dimension {required}|string| Category of the object. Enum values: `CAMPAIGN`, `ADGROUP`, `AD`.| #|dimension_ids {required}|string[]| IDs of the objects that you want to bind to the rule.| #|bind_type {required}|string| Whether you want to bind objects to a rule or unbind objects from a rule. Enum values: `BIND`, `UNBIND`.| |lang|string|Language of the returned messages. Enum values: `ZH` (Simplified Chinese), `EN` (English)(default), `JA` (Japanese).| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code JSON JSON) { "advertiser_id": 75960823018, "bind_info":[ { "rule_id":6984697088064290818, "dimension":"CAMPAIGN", "dimension_ids":[123456], "bind_type":"BIND" } ], "lang":"EN" } (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id|string| Unique ID of the request| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code JSON JSON) { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "202107290700180102440530181709ABE4", "data": {} } (/code) ```
